title: Finite Recurrence Prefix Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite recurrence-prefix bad value and bad affine-step QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact finite replay computes Fibonacci F_6 = 8 while one malformed row claims F_6 = 9; exact affine recurrence replay computes x_4 = 15 while another malformed row claims x_4 = 14.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional recurrence rows only when they add distinct matrix-state, invariant, exact-sum, or closed-prefix boundary pressure beyond the current Fibonacci and affine-step rows; keep closed forms, asymptotics, convergence, and stability theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite recurrence prefixes and companion-matrix steps as deterministic exact-rational replay rows.
Replay finite recurrence witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Route false finite recurrence-value and affine-step claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the offending value.
Keep induction over all n, closed-form solving, asymptotics, convergence, and stability theorems marked Lean-horizon.
